Author: Mihai Maruseac <mihaimaruseac@google.com>

    Properly handle the case where `SpecializeType()` returns an error `Status`.

part.text: The target release has the same `PreInputInit` code pattern, so the security fix maps directly: convert the debug-only status check into a runtime status propagation via `construction_status_`.
The backport hunk validates cleanly against the target base. I’m applying only that source change now.
